recommendations.title: Certified Copy
recommendations.overview: In Tuscany to promote his latest book, a middle-aged English writer meets a French woman who leads him to the village of Lucignano.

recommendations.title: Swades
recommendations.overview: A successful Indian scientist returns home to his village to take his nanny back to America with him, and in the process rediscovers his roots.

recommendations.title: Foster
recommendations.overview: Looking to adopt a child and unable to conceive a child of their own, the Morrisons' lives are turned upside down when a seven-year-old boy unexpectedly shows up on their doorstep.

recommendations.title: The Boy Who Harnessed the Wind
recommendations.overview: Against all the odds, a thirteen year old boy in Malawi invents an unconventional way to save his family and village from famine.

recommendations.title: Planes
recommendations.overview: Dusty is a cropdusting plane who dreams of competing in a famous aerial race. The problem? He is hopelessly afraid of heights. With the support of his mentor Skipper and a host of new friends, Dusty sets off to make his dreams come true.

recommendations.title: Planes: Fire & Rescue
recommendations.overview: When world-famous air racer Dusty learns that his engine is damaged and he may never race again, he must shift gears and is launched into the world of aerial firefighting. Dusty joins forces with veteran fire and rescue helicopter Blade Ranger and hi

recommendations.title: Fireheart
recommendations.overview: The film explores the world of firefighters in 1920s New York City and tells the story of a 16-year-old girl who will have to become a hero in order to save her city.
recommendations.director: Laurent Zeitoun, Theodore Anthony Lee Ty

recommendations.title: Theatre of Blood
recommendations.overview: A Shakespearean actor takes poetic revenge on the critics who denied him recognition.

recommendations.title: You're Killing Me Susana
recommendations.overview: An actor's world comes crashing down after he learns that his wife has left him.

recommendations.title: The Illusionist
recommendations.overview: A French illusionist travels to Scotland to work. He meets a young woman in a small village. Their ensuing adventure in Edinburgh changes both their lives forever.
